description: Composition Checked round neck blouson tunic top made of 100% cotton, that has grey, black and white checks with navy blue accents, silver thread detailing, short mock buttoned placket, three fourth sleeves with an elbow button, and elasticated waistline which flares out into pleats Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron If you're in the mood to have some checkered fun, this blouson tunic top from jealous 21 will fulfill your heart's desire with elan. The cotton fabric promises comfort, while the smart checks guarantee attention from strangers! Pair this top with leggings and ballerinas for a cute, neat look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33"
